name: battery-sipjuice
description: Battery SipJuice — Linux 电池监控与健康管理工具

scripts.build:deb: npm run icons:generate && tauri build --bundles deb
scripts.build:rpm: npm run icons:generate && tauri build --bundles rpm
scripts.build:linux:packages: npm run icons:generate && tauri build --bundles deb,rpm
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run icons:generate && tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles deb,rpm
